name: Tritech Group Limited
summary: Tritech Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in engineering, and water and environmental business in Singapore and the People's Republic of China. The company offers geotechnical instrumentation and monitoring services; geotechnical and geological site explorations; investigations, analysis, and testing for general and infrastructure construction; design, consultancy, and project management services for infrastructure, environmental, geotechnical, civil, and rock engineering works; and products and related services, as well as supplies and installs geotechnical instruments, and undertakes automatic tunnel monitoring survey and other land surveying works. In addition, the company offers produces and sells bottled and alkaline drinking water and dispensers; markets related technologies, systems, and services; and supplies water quality monitoring products and services. Further, it engages in soil investigation, treatment, and stabilization activities; development and sale of engineering finite element analysis programs in the geotechnical field; designing and developing automation and engineering systems; provision of remote water monitoring services; and architectural, engineering, and professional consultancy activities. The company serves a range of industries, such as infrastructure, oil and gas, and commercial and residential property developments. Tritech Group Limited was founded in 1999 and is based in Singapore.
